answer.description: Answer an incoming call. Only valid for inbound calls in 'ringing' state.

hangup.description: End the call. Sends SIP BYE (connected) or CANCEL (connecting).

hold.description: Put the call on hold. Sends re-INVITE with sendonly SDP. Call must be in 'connected' state.

unhold.description: Resume a held call. Sends re-INVITE with sendrecv SDP.

mute.description: Mute the microphone. Local operation only — no SIP signaling.

toggleMute.description: Toggle between muted and unmuted states.

sendDTMF.description: Send a DTMF tone to the remote party.

transfer.description: Blind transfer the call to another target via SIP REFER. The local call ends after transfer.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Transfer target (phone number or SIP URI)

attendedTransfer.description: Attended transfer — connect the remote party of this call with the remote party of another active call. Both calls must be connected.

parameters.name: otherCall
parameters.description: The other active call to bridge with

getStats.description: Get a one-time snapshot of call quality metrics from the WebRTC peer connection.

startQualityMonitoring.description: Start periodic call quality monitoring. Emits 'qualityStats' events at the specified interval.

enableNoiseIsolation.description: Enable server-side noise isolation. Sends SIP INFO to the feature server.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.type: { vendor?: string; level?: number; model?: string }

disableNoiseIsolation.description: Disable server-side noise isolation. Sends SIP INFO to the feature server.
